race.comment: SAVISANTA (3) showed plenty of ability last time in, sixth in the G1 Victoria Derby before a spell, resuming over 1515m at Sale and bolting in with his maiden at $1.24. He profiles as a horse who can make his way through the grades and pick this off as well. BRING FORTH (1) was caught very wide and faded first up as favourite at Sale, well beaten at $2.15. An extra furlong and a bit of luck can see him turn things around. FIGLIO D'ARGENTO (2) won well over this route last time out and finds another suitable race here. Expect he lands just off the pace and takes holding out. REVOLVER (6) won an easier race at Geelong last time but can continue to progress.
